items.title: Hundreds, Tens, and Ones Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Show each number as hundreds, tens, and ones.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after a place-value lesson to see whether students can represent 3-digit numbers using hundreds, tens, and ones.
items.description: Students represent 3-digit numbers by identifying the hundreds, tens, and ones. This short Quick Check is designed for focused place-value review.

items.title: Subtraction Within 20 Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after subtraction practice to see whether students can subtract facts within 20.
items.description: Students solve subtraction facts within 20. This short Quick Check is designed for focused review after subtraction practice.

items.title: Addition Within 20 Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after addition practice to see whether students can add facts within 20.
items.description: Students solve addition facts within 20. This short Quick Check is designed for focused review after addition practice.

items.title: Compare 3-Digit Numbers Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Compare each pair of numbers using >, <, or =.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after place-value comparison practice to see whether students can compare 3-digit numbers using >, <, or =.
items.description: Students compare 3-digit numbers using >, <, or =. This short Quick Check is designed for focused place-value review.

items.title: Compare Simple Fractions Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Compare each pair of fractions using >, <, or =.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after fraction comparison practice to see whether students can compare simple fractions using >, <, or =.
items.description: Students compare simple fractions using >, <, or =. This short Quick Check is designed for focused fraction comparison review.

items.title: Missing Addends Within 20 Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Find the missing number in each addition fact.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after missing-addend practice to see whether students can find the unknown part in addition facts within 20.
items.description: Students find missing addends within 20. This short Quick Check is designed for focused part-whole review.

items.title: Identify and Use Pattern Rules Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Read each pattern. Write or use the rule to answer each question.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after pattern-rule practice to see whether students can describe a rule and use it to continue or complete a pattern.
items.description: Students identify or use pattern rules to continue or complete patterns. This short Quick Check is designed for focused patterning review.

items.title: Expanded Form to Standard Form Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.studentInstructions: Write each number in standard form.
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after place-value practice to see whether students can write 3-digit numbers in standard form from expanded form.
items.description: Students write 3-digit numbers in standard form from expanded form. This short Quick Check is designed for focused place-value review.

items.title: Multiplication Word Problems Quick Check
items.subject: Math
items.teacherNote: Use this quick check after multiplication practice to see whether students can solve short equal-groups word problems.
items.description: Students solve short equal-groups multiplication word problems. This Quick Check is designed for focused multiplication review.
